use_cases: Hero section background for creative portfolios and landing pages
Animated visual backdrop for media and entertainment websites
Showcase component for creative tools or design software platforms
Ambient 3D visualization for tech product marketing
ai_summary: A WebGL shader-based 3D geode visualization component that renders a colorful, crystalline raymarched effect with rotating cell patterns and smooth color cycling. Features continuous time-based animation and mouse tracking uniforms. Designed as a visually striking hero or background component for creative, media, and SaaS landing pages.
